admin.workspaceDescription: Manage accounts, authentication services, runtime settings, and audit records

overview.title: Admin Overview
overview.description: Current players, profiles, texture assets, and authentication sessions in one place.
overview.chartDescription: Daily active users, active players, new textures, and Yggdrasil API calls over the last 7 days.
overview.chartNoActivity: No activity was recorded in this 7-day window.
overview.activityDescription: Recent auth, account, and admin events.

systemHealth.healthyDesc: All required runtime checks passed in the latest system health task.
systemHealth.unknownDesc: No completed system health result is available yet.
systemHealth.noSummary: The latest health check reported an issue without component details.

minecraftProfilePage.title: Minecraft profile
minecraftProfilePage.description: Review one Minecraft profile, its owning account, texture bindings, and launcher-visible state.
minecraftProfilePage.recordDescription: Operational identifiers and timestamps for this Minecraft profile.
minecraftProfilePage.renameDescription: The profile UUID and texture bindings stay unchanged. Selected launcher tokens must refresh before they can be used again.
minecraftProfilePage.textureListDescription: Review skin and cape records bound to this profile. Launchers use these resources to build texture properties.
minecraftProfilePage.noTextures: No textures are bound to this profile.
minecraftProfilePage.deleteDescription: This removes profile texture bindings, cleans unreferenced texture objects, and revokes launcher tokens selected for this profile.
minecraftProfilePage.deleteTextureDescription: The {{textureType}} binding will be removed from this profile. Unreferenced texture data follows server cleanup rules.

textureLibraryPage.title: Texture Library
textureLibraryPage.description: Manage administrator tags available to public library filters and user wardrobes.
textureLibraryPage.name: Tag name
textureLibraryPage.editDescription: Adjust the tag name, color, and sort order. Existing user bindings stay attached to the same tag ID.
textureLibraryPage.deleteDescription: After deleting {{name}}, bound textures will no longer have this tag.
textureLibraryPage.emptyDescription: Create tags so users can bind them in wardrobes and visitors can filter the public library.

textureLibraryTexturesPage.title: Texture Library
textureLibraryTexturesPage.description: Review every texture uploaded to the system and filter by visibility, moderation status, and publication state.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.emptyDescription: Wardrobe uploads will appear here after users add textures.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.reviewDescription: Add a review note and confirm the action.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.approveDescription: {{name}} will be added to the public texture library.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.rejectDescription: {{name}} will not enter the public library. The uploader can see the reason in their wardrobe and submit again.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.unpublishDescription: {{name}} will be removed from the public texture library.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.deleteDescription: {{name}} will be removed from the uploader's wardrobe and unbound from any Minecraft profiles using it. This cannot be undone.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.reviewNotePlaceholder: Visible handling note for the uploader
textureLibraryTexturesPage.reviewNoteHint: Optional. The uploader can see this note.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.rejectNoteHint: Rejecting requires a clear reason. The uploader will see this note in their wardrobe.
textureLibraryTexturesPage.reviewNoteRequired: A review note is required when rejecting a texture.

textureLibraryReviewPage.title: Texture Reviews
textureLibraryReviewPage.description: Handle textures submitted to the public library. This view defaults to public, unpublished, pending review records.

textureLibraryReportsPage.title: Texture Reports
textureLibraryReportsPage.description: Handle signed-in user reports for published public texture library entries.
textureLibraryReportsPage.emptyDescription: Reports submitted by signed-in users will appear here.
textureLibraryReportsPage.acceptDescription: The report will be accepted and the texture will be removed from the public library.
textureLibraryReportsPage.rejectDescription: The report will be rejected and the texture will remain published.

textureLibraryDetailPage.title: Texture Detail
textureLibraryDetailPage.description: Review the texture file, uploader, public library moderation state, and preview.
textureLibraryDetailPage.notFoundDescription: This texture was not found, or the current account cannot view it.
textureLibraryDetailPage.recordDescription: File metadata for this texture, including dimensions, type, uploader, and tags.
textureLibraryDetailPage.reviewDescription: Submission, review, and unpublish status for the public texture library.

configPage.title: System Config
configPage.description: Review and adjust server runtime settings. Changes apply immediately or after restart depending on the setting.
configPage.editorDescription: Enter values by configuration type. Plain text, JSON strings, and string arrays are validated separately.

auditPage.title: Audit
auditPage.description: Search audit events created by account, authentication, texture, and administrative actions.
auditPage.emptyDescription: This instance has no audit events to display yet.
auditPage.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the action or entity type filters and search again.

tasksPage.title: Background Tasks
tasksPage.description: Review background task execution, retry failed jobs, and clean completed history.
tasksPage.filtersDescription: Filter task status. Cleaning history requires an explicit finished-before timestamp.
tasksPage.creator: Creator

aboutPage.title: About AsterYggdrasil
aboutPage.description: Review the current server instance version, build information, and project resources.
aboutPage.tagline: Self-hosted Minecraft skin site and Yggdrasil authentication server
aboutPage.summary: AsterYggdrasil handles site accounts, Minecraft profiles, texture management, and launcher authentication in one operations-focused panel.
aboutPage.metadataNote: Version and build time come from the admin API so operators can confirm which server instance this panel is connected to.
aboutPage.resourcesDescription: Review the docs, source, and license to confirm project origin and deployment context.
aboutPage.capabilitiesDescription: This page identifies the instance. Configuration and data operations are handled in their dedicated admin pages.
aboutPage.capabilityAuthDesc: Handles launcher login, token lifecycle, join, and hasJoined checks.
aboutPage.capabilityProfilesDesc: Maintains Minecraft UUIDs, profile names, and account bindings.
aboutPage.capabilityTexturesDesc: Manages skins, capes, and launcher-readable texture metadata.
aboutPage.capabilityOperationsDesc: Provides audit logs, background tasks, external auth, and runtime config infrastructure.
